arts.ttl: Juventus Face Dilemma as Vlahovic Likely to Miss Atalanta Clash
arts.sum: Juventus are bracing for another challenging match as star striker Dusan Vlahovic is expected to miss the upcoming game against Atalanta due to ongoing muscle fatigue. Thiago Motta, the team's coach, had previously indicated that Vlahovic's participation would depend on his performance in training, but recent updates suggest that he has not recovered sufficiently. arts.ttl: Juventus Target Kolo Muani: Giuntoli Plans Paris Mission
arts.sum: Juventus are set to make their first move in the January transfer window with the acquisition of 21-year-old right-back Alberto Costa from Vitoria Guimaraes. This €15 million investment addresses the immediate need left by Danilo's impending departure and aligns with the club's future plans. However, Juventus' sporting director Cristiano Giuntoli has his sights set on bigger targets, particularly in central defense and attack. The post Juventus Target Kolo Muani: Giuntoli Plans Paris Mission appeared first on FootItalia.com.
